stemHtml: On a conventional aeroplane, what does the automatic pitch trim system do?

options.a: It is an autopilot mode to ensure the correct rotation rate is maintained during take-off.
options.b: It is a system used to compensate for incorrect pilot inputs.
options.c: When force on the elevator control is detected, it directs the pilot to trim the elevator to relieve the load.
options.d: When force on the elevator control is detected, the system moves the trim to relieve the load.
